name: button
title: Button
description: Primary action component with variants (primary/secondary), 8 semantic intents, 4 sizes, icon support, loading state, dropdown indicator, badge count, and elevation levels.

consumption.typeImport: import type { ButtonProps, ButtonVariant, ButtonElevation, ButtonIntent, ButtonSize, ButtonContrast } from '@compomo/ui';
consumption.iconImport: import { IconName } from '@ds-mo/icons';  // Tree-shakeable, import only what you need

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Button. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.
Used internally by Button. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.
Used internally by Button. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.

label.description: Button text. Omit for icon-only button.

elevation.description: Defaults to 'none' for primary, 'flat' for secondary.
